specific_mechanism: Astrobiologists identify potential life signatures via chemical disequilibrium: persistent gas ratios (O2/CH4) that abiotic processes cannot maintain are biosignatures
llm_application: LLM training-data biosignature detection: persistent token-distribution ratios in a corpus that random sampling cannot maintain indicate human-curated content vs synthetic content.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes astrobiology spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
